dag.description: Basic end-to-end pipeline with dummy training, packaging, payload preparation, and registration

metadata.name: dummy_e2e_basic
metadata.description: Basic end-to-end pipeline with dummy training, packaging, payload preparation, and registration

agent_context.when_to_use: Testing/development only: validate the packaging→registration pipeline flow without real training. Simplest way to test MIMS registration works.
agent_context.when_not_to_use: ANY production use. Never use dummy DAGs for real model deployment.
differentiators: No data loading required — DummyTraining generates mock model

prerequisites.how: Confirm this is for testing, not production

safe_defaults: All defaults are fine for testing
common_pitfalls: NEVER deploy a model from a dummy DAG to production
Registration will create real MIMS entries — clean up after testing
Use a test service_name to avoid polluting production registries
